problem_text_cn: 4-18 1994年7月16日20时15分，哈勃望远镜观察到了休梅克‑列维9号彗星的第一块碎片与木星相撞，而后其他碎片相继与木星相撞，直至7月22日8时12分才告结束。在这之前彗星早已开始绕木星作椭圆运动，据天文测量数据绘制的轨道如图4-15所示，请估算彗星碎片刚进入木星大气层时相对木星的速度大小。
problem_text_en: 4-18 On July 16, 1994, 20:15, the Hubble Space Telescope observed the first fragment of comet Shoemaker‑Levy 9 colliding with Jupiter. Then other fragments collided with Jupiter successively until 8:12 on July 22. Before that, the comet had already been moving in an elliptical orbit around Jupiter. Based on the orbit drawn from astronomical measurement data shown in Figure 4-15, estimate the speed of the comet fragments relative to Jupiter when they just entered Jupiter’s atmosphere.
problem_solution_cn:
解 轨道图线中最远两点间距约5.6cm，与此间距线垂直的最宽间距约0.4cm。标度尺中$ 30\times10^{4}km $对应的长度约3.5cm，因此得
$$ a=24\times10^{4}km,\quad b=1.7\times10^{4}km. $$
彗星在1993年7月1日的位置和1994年7月16日与木星相撞位置间几乎相隔半个椭圆，周期可估算为
$$ T=2\text{年}=730\text{天}. $$
彗星碎片刚进入木星大气层时相对木星的速度，可估算为椭圆轨道中近木星点的速度$v$，可导得（过程略）
$$ v=\frac{a+c}{b}\sqrt{\frac{GM}{a}}, $$
式中$M$为木星质量。椭圆轨道周期公式为
$$ T=2\pi a\sqrt{a/GM}, $$
又因$ b\ll a,\ c\approx a $，得
$$ v=\frac{4\pi a^{2}}{bT}=67\,\text{km}/\text{s}. $$
problem_solution_en:
Solution The distance between the two farthest points of the orbit curve is about 5.6 cm, and the widest spacing perpendicular to this line is about 0.4 cm. The scale bar corresponds $ 30\times10^{4}km $ to a length of about 3.5 cm, hence we obtain
$$ a=24\times10^{4}km,\quad b=1.7\times10^{4}km. $$
The comet’s position on July 1, 1993 and its collision with Jupiter on July 16, 1994 are almost half an ellipse apart; the period can be estimated as
$$ T=2\text{years}=730\text{days}. $$
The speed of the fragments relative to Jupiter when they just enter Jupiter’s atmosphere can be approximated as the velocity $v$ at the perijove of the elliptical orbit. It can be derived (process omitted)
$$ v=\frac{a+c}{b}\sqrt{\frac{GM}{a}}, $$
where $M$ is the mass of Jupiter. The orbital period formula for an ellipse is
$$ T=2\pi a\sqrt{a/GM}, $$
and because $ b\ll a,\ c\approx a $, we get
$$ v=\frac{4\pi a^{2}}{bT}=67\,\text{km}/\text{s}. $$
img_cn: 图片为一页物理习题集页面截图，题号为4-18。页面内容包含题目描述、解题过程、公式推导和最终答案。题目描述了1994年彗星碎片撞击木星的天文事件，要求估算碎片进入木星大气层时的相对速度。解题过程包括对椭圆轨道参数a、b的测量和估算，周期T的估算，以及利用轨道力学公式计算速度v。页面右下角包含一张轨道示意图，标注为“图4-15”，显示了彗星绕木星的椭圆轨道。背景为白色，文字为黑色印刷体。
img_en: The image is a screenshot of a physics exercise page, problem number 4-18. The page includes the problem description, solution process, formula derivations, and the final answer. The problem describes the 1994 astronomical event of comet fragments colliding with Jupiter, asking to estimate the relative speed of the fragments upon entering Jupiter’s atmosphere. The solution involves measuring/estimating the ellipse parameters a, b, estimating the period T, and using orbital mechanics formulas to compute the speed v. The lower right corner of the page contains a schematic diagram labeled “Figure 4-15”, showing the elliptical orbit of the comet around Jupiter. The background is white, and the text is in black printed type.
